date_notes: Cancellation announced summer 2019. Handoff carried a June 2019 date that conflicts with EVT-007 — August confirmed by CBC source.
title_en: Province cancels $595M public laboratory project with $23M already spent
title_fr: La province annule un projet de laboratoire public de 595 M$ dont 23 M$ déjà dépensés
description_en: The government cancels the centralized laboratory project begun under the previous government, with roughly $23M already spent, and signals a shift toward privately contracted community lab services.
verification_notes: Verified against R-004 (CBC): $595M capital budget, $23M already spent — both figures corroborated in article body. Exact August 2019 date acceptable at month precision.
